description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light blue exterior and a large, complex hip roof in shades of gray. The front features a double garage with a white car parked on a paved driveway, and a covered entryway supported by stone columns, leading to a porch with red chairs. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on all sides, with white trim and a mix of single and double panes. The rear of the house has a set of double doors and additional windows, while the sides are more plain, with minimal fenestration. The property is enclosed by a low white fence, and the paved area extends around the house, providing ample space for parking and outdoor activities.
description: A two-story light blue suburban house with a large hip roof, double garage, covered porch, and symmetrical white-trimmed windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with porch and columns, driveway, and red chairs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the extended paved area with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying double doors, symmetrical windows, and the plain back facade.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage, driveway, and a simple arrangement of windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with stone columns, steps, and a single main door flanked by windows and decorative red chairs.
